title: Construction playset intended for building complex mechanic 3-d models
abstract: A construction playset is intended for building complex mechanic 3-D models comprising static and moving parts and with using no adhesive materials, and not limited on their length, width and volume by the size of fixing (connection) elements constituting the construction kit of elements, made of ecologically friendly materials. The construction playset is composed of forming, building and fixing elements that are capable of consecutive connection between them. The first ones have equal thickness and required shape. At least two of the forming elements have at least one rectangular and/or round hole; and/or at least one outer slot and/or slit, and that are disposed layer-wise with the possibility to be connected between by at least one fixing element, forming together a static or moving construction. The fixing element has a needle-like shape and sharpened ends and and round-shaped cross-cutting with the diameter equal to the diameter of at least one round hole on the forming elements. At least two building elements have rectangular-shaped ends being equal to the size of at least one rectangular hole on forming elements, and are fit to be inserted perpendicular into rectangular holes on the forming elements with their further coupling with the latter. Their thickness is equal to the width of slots and/or slits on the forming elements.
claims: Claims Claims A construction playset intended for building complex mechanic 3-D models comprising static and moving parts with using no adhesive materials, and not limited on their length, width and volume by the size of fixing (connection) elements constituting the construction kit of elements, made of ecologically friendly materials, is distinguished by the kit of elements comprising forming, building and fixing elements that are capable of consecutive connection between them, for that the first ones have equal thickness and required shape and at least two of the forming elements have at least one rectangular and/or round hole; and/or at least one outer slot and/or slit, and that are disposed layer-wise with the possibility to be connected between them by at least one fixing element, forming together a static or moving construction, for that the fixing element has a needle-like shape and sharpened ends, and round-shaped cross-cutting with the diameter equal to the diameter of at least one round hole on the forming elements, and at least two building elements have rectangular-shaped ends, being equal to the size of at least one rectangular hole on the forming elements, and are fit to be inserted perpendicular into rectangular holes on the forming elements with their further coupling with the latter, and for that their thickness is equal to the width of slots and/or slits on the forming elements.
